title: 神奈川冲浪里
sourceReference: Katsushika Hokusai, The Great Wave off Kanagawa, circa 1831; public-domain composition reference
assetPolicy: GPT-generated washi-paper reinterpretation; no source artwork pixels copied into the project
masterPromptSummary: A recognizable museum-quality washi paper-collage reinterpretation with a giant curling Prussian-blue wave, claw-like foam, three boats, rowers and distant Mount Fuji.

background.processing: built-in precise object removal; calm washi sky and distant sea retained as the empty assembly plate

layers.processing: registered color-aware semantic masks; full-canvas lossless WebP

relief.processing: registered master color plus deterministic luminance depth with semantic wave and foam boosts
